response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for 'LET'S JUST CRASH' and 'Blue World'. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were fully utilized for disambiguation; manual transcription and translation were performed for the intro, interlude conversations, and the on-screen title card for 'Blue World'. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions in rapid-fire vocal sections to prevent cascading delays; split long sentences during conversations to maintain readability and character limits.

subtitles.original: ...あれば嬉しいです。そして改めて
subtitles.english: ...I'd be happy. And again,

subtitles.original: カリオペさん呼んでくれてありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: thank you for inviting me, Calliope-san.

subtitles.original: いえいえ、こちらこそ！
subtitles.english: Not at all, the pleasure is mine!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、それで聴いてくださいね。でもシウドウさん、紹介してください！
subtitles.english: Then, please listen to this. But syudou-san, please introduce it!

subtitles.original: はい。
subtitles.english: Yes.

subtitles.original: それではお聴きください、LET'S JUST CRASH！
subtitles.english: Then please listen, LET'S JUST CRASH!

subtitles.original: Hey hey 皆さん！
subtitles.english: Hey hey everyone!

subtitles.original: シウドウさんありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: syudou-san, thank you very much!

subtitles.original: LET'S JUST CRASH!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！バイバイ、シウドウさん！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! Bye bye, syudou-san!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！Thank you Dead Beats and カリオッペ！
subtitles.english: Bye bye! Thank you Dead Beats and Calliope!

subtitles.original: Yeah yeah, peace!

subtitles.original: Ah 皆さん、that was so fun.
subtitles.english: Ah everyone, that was so fun.

subtitles.original: I really respect syudou-san as an artist.
subtitles.english: I really respect syudou-san as an artist.

subtitles.original: He does a lot of his work himself for his songs,
subtitles.english: He does a lot of his work himself for his songs,

subtitles.original: you know, writes and composes and sings...
subtitles.english: you know, writes and composes and sings...

subtitles.original: ...and everything. He's really cool. Big ups!
subtitles.english: ...and everything. He's really cool. Big ups!

subtitles.original: But I think it is about time
subtitles.english: But I think it is about time

subtitles.original: that maybe we get back to the future? The present?
subtitles.english: that maybe we get back to the future? The present?

subtitles.original: Where I'm performing with all my friends right now. Hmm, yes.
subtitles.english: Where I'm performing with all my friends right now. Hmm, yes.

subtitles.original: But that was a lot of fun.
subtitles.english: But that was a lot of fun.

subtitles.original: Ah, as I thought. Right on time.
subtitles.english: Ah, as I thought. Right on time.

subtitles.original: It looks like it's time for me to get back to the future
subtitles.english: It looks like it's time for me to get back to the future

subtitles.original: and go sing with all my friends again. Back in the present,
subtitles.english: and go sing with all my friends again. Back in the present,

subtitles.original: future... I don't know, it doesn't even make any sense. Let's go!

subtitles.english: See you there!
